>更新时间：2026.06.25

# 微信支付 - 代金券（普通商户）文档索引

> 微信支付官方营销工具，支持商户配置满减、折扣等券型，可在支付前发放、支付中自动核销。支持线上线下多场景投放，数据实时可查，助力商户拉新、复购与客流提升，适配多行业营销需求。

## 接入指引
- [业务示例代码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4015894256.md)
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012084079.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4015880636.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012084207.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012084133.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4020807296.md)

## API 列表
- [核销事件回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012285250.md)
- [图片上传（营销专用）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012557233.md)
### 批次
- [创建代金券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534633.md)
- [激活代金券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012460137.md)
- [暂停代金券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012460305.md)
- [重启代金券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012460411.md)
- [条件查询批次列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012460489.md)
- [查询批次详情](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012460564.md)
- [查询代金券可用商户](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012463358.md)
- [查询代金券可用单品](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012463442.md)
- [下载批次退款明细](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012463523.md)
- [下载批次核销明细](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012463585.md)
### 券
- [根据商户号查用户的券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012534690.md)
- [发放指定批次的代金券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012463767.md)
- [查询代金券详情](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012486942.md)
### 消息通知地址
- [查询代金券消息通知地址](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012464070.md)
- [设置代金券消息通知地址](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012464198.md)
